one_time_description: Large Government of Canada transfer of $5,900,002 recorded in 2021 (nil in prior year), likely a one-time settlement or special funding; also correction of prior year errors for deferred ISC revenue ($99,899) and investment loss ($3,455)
economic_notes: Nation operates Lands and Resources, Economic Development segments. Involved in logging, contracting, fishing (DFO funding), gaming revenue sharing (BCFN), and rental income. Investment in Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. at 25% ownership (equity method). Subsidiaries include Cougar Point Development Inc., High Bar Resources & Development LLP, Spirit Valley Development LP, and Spirit Valley Development GP Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Large one-time Government of Canada transfer of $5,900,002 in 2021 (zero in 2020) drove the annual surplus to $8.2M. Prior year figures are restated due to correction of errors: $99,899 ISC deferred revenue not recorded and $3,455 investment loss not recorded. Nation has 4 consolidated subsidiaries and 1 GBE (Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. at 25%). No remuneration schedule included in the document. Temporary investments estimated from cash flow investing activities ($562,870 invested during year added to prior balance). Current liabilities not separately broken out on face of balance sheet in extracted text.
